request: Build an internal CRM for sales and customer success with lead intake, account hierarchy, role-based access for reps/managers/admins, task workflows, approvals for discounts, and KPI dashboards.
Create an enterprise approval workflow application for procurement and legal reviews with multi-step approvals, escalation rules, reviewer comments, and full audit history.
Generate an operations dashboard platform with incident tracking, service health views, on-call role segregation, and governance controls for release approvals.
Build an inventory and asset tracking app for IT and facilities with lifecycle states, transfer workflows, barcode lookup endpoints, approval gates, and analytics.
Create a compliance review workflow system with policy entities, evidence submission, reviewer/admin roles, exception approvals, and deploy-readiness reporting.
Generate an employee onboarding platform with HR/IT/manager roles, checklist workflows, provisioning approvals, and status dashboards with audit events.
Build a support ticket triage app with customer and agent portals, severity-based routing workflows, escalation approvals, and service-level reporting.
Create a multi-role admin portal with operator/reviewer/admin separation, policy-managed actions, deployment controls, rollback workflows, and observability dashboards.
